samples.gvd:
module asyn_fifo #(
    parameter	WIDTH = 8,
    parameter 	DEPTH = 16,
    parameter ADDR_WIDTH = $clog2(DEPTH)
) (
    input 					wclk,
    input 					rclk,
    input 					wrstn,
    input					rrstn,
    input 					winc,
    input 			 		rinc,
    input 		[WIDTH-1:0]	wdata,
    output wire				wfull,
    output wire				rempty,
    output reg [WIDTH-1:0]	rdata
);

endmodule

module dual_port_RAM #(parameter DEPTH = 16,  parameter WIDTH = 8)
(
	 input wclk	,
	 input wenc	,
	 input [$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0] waddr  ,
	 input [WIDTH-1:0] wdata ,
	 input rclk	,
	 input renc	,
	 input [$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0] raddr ,
	 output reg [WIDTH-1:0] rdata 		
);

reg [WIDTH-1:0] RAM_MEM [0:DEPTH-1];

always @(posedge wclk) begin
	if(wenc)
		RAM_MEM[waddr] <= wdata;
end 

always @(posedge rclk) begin
	if(renc)
		rdata <= RAM_MEM[raddr];
end 

endmodule
samples.xml_description:
<module id="asyn_fifo">
    <description>Asynchronous FIFO implementation with configurable parameters WIDTH and DEPTH.</description>
    <ports>
        <input id="wclk">Write clock signal.</input>
        <input id="rclk">Read clock signal.</input>
        <input id="wrstn">Write reset signal.</input>
        <input id="rrstn">Read reset signal.</input>
        <input id="winc">Write increment signal.</input>
        <input id="rinc">Read increment signal.</input>
        <input id="wdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Write data input.</input>
        <output id="wfull">Write full signal.</output>
        <output id="rempty">Read empty signal.</output>
        <output id="rdata" width_description="[WIDTH-1:0]">Read data output.</output>
    </ports>
    <parameter_description>
        <param id="WIDTH">FIFO data width.</param>
        <param id="DEPTH">FIFO depth.</param>
    </parameter_description>
    <logic_description type="combinational_logic">
        <assign id="wen">winc & ~wfull;</assign>
        <assign id="ren">rinc & ~rempty;</assign>
        <assign id="waddr">waddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];</assign>
        <assign id="raddr">raddr_bin[$clog2(DEPTH)-1:0];</assign>
    </logic_description>
    <implementation>
        // Dual-port RAM instance
        <instance id="RAM" module_id="dual_port_RAM">
            <connection id="wclk" source_module_id="asyn_fifo" source_port_id="wclk"/>
            <connection id="rclk" source_module_id="asyn_fifo" source_port_id="rclk"/>
            <connection id="wenc" source_module_id="asyn_fifo" source_port_id="wen"/>
            <connection id="renc" source_module_id="asyn_fifo" source_port_id="ren"/>
            <connection id="waddr" source_module_id="asyn_fifo" source_port_id="waddr"/>
            <connection id="raddr" source_module_id="asyn_fifo" source_port_id="raddr"/>
            <connection id="wdata" source_module_id="asyn_fifo" source_port_id="wdata"/>
            <connection id="rdata" destination_module_id="asyn_fifo" destination_port_id="rdata"/>
        </instance>
        
        // Write Pointer Logic
        <reg id="waddr_bin" init_value="0" width_description="$clog2(DEPTH)">Binary representation of write pointer.</reg>
        <always @ (posedge wclk or negedge wrstn)>
            if (!wrstn)
                waddr_bin <= 0;
            else if (winc && !wfull)
                waddr_bin <= waddr_bin + 1;
        end
        <wire id="wptr" width_description="4">Gray code representation of write pointer.</wire>
        <assign id="wptr[3]" value="waddr_bin[3] ^ waddr_bin[2] ^ waddr_bin[1] ^ waddr_bin[0]"/> <!-- MSB -->
        <assign id="wptr[2]" value="waddr_bin[2] ^ waddr_bin[1] ^ waddr_bin[0]"/>
        <assign id="wptr[1]" value="waddr_bin[1] ^ waddr_bin[0]"/>
        <assign id="wptr[0]" value="waddr_bin[0]"/>
        
        // Read Pointer Logic
        <reg id="raddr_bin" init_value="0" width_description="$clog2(DEPTH)">Binary representation of read pointer.</reg>
        <always @ (posedge rclk or negedge rrstn)>
            if (!rrstn)
                raddr_bin <= 0;
            else if (rinc && !rempty)
                raddr_bin <= raddr_bin + 1;
        end
        <wire id="rptr" width_description="4">Gray code representation of read pointer.</wire>
        <assign id="rptr[3]" value="raddr_bin[3] ^ raddr_bin[2] ^ raddr_bin[1] ^ raddr_bin[0]"/> <!-- MSB -->
        <assign id="rptr[2]" value="raddr_bin[2] ^ raddr_bin[1] ^ raddr_bin[0]"/>
        <assign id="rptr[1]" value="raddr_bin[1] ^ raddr_bin[0]"/>
        <assign id="rptr[0]" value="raddr_bin[0]"/>
        
        // Synchronizers for Read Pointer
        <reg id="rptr_buff" init_value="0" width_description="4">Buffer for synchronized read pointer.</reg>
        <always @ (posedge wclk or negedge wrstn)> 
            if (!wrstn)
                rptr_buff <= 0;
            else
                rptr_buff <= rptr;
        end
        
        // Synchronizers for Write Pointer
        <reg id="wptr_buff" init_value="0" width_description="4">Buffer for synchronized write pointer.</reg>
        <always @ (posedge rclk or negedge rrstn))
            if (!rrstn)
                wptr_buff <= 0;
            else
                wptr_buff <= wptr;
        end
        
        // Full and Empty Signal Generation
        <wire id="wfull" value="(wptr == {~rptr_buff[3], rptr_buff[2:0]})"/>
        <wire id="rempty" value="(rptr == wptr_buff)"/>
    </implementation>
    
endmodule
